'''gafaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loanmonger|loanmonger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loanmonger|loanmonger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gafaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæfæyæth|gæfæyæth]] || [[word:gæfæyæj|gæfæyæj]] || [[word:gæfæyæsh|gæfæyæsh]] || [[word:gæfæyæ|gæfæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gafafayath|gafafayath]] || [[word:gafafayaj|gafafayaj]] || [[word:gafafayash|gafafayash]] || [[word:gafafaya|gafafaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gafayath|gafayath]] || [[word:gafayaj|gafayaj]] || [[word:gafayash|gafayash]] || [[word:gafaya|gafaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gafafyath|gafafyath]] || [[word:gafafyaj|gafafyaj]] || [[word:gafafyash|gafafyash]] || [[word:gafafyaf|gafafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gafayatha|gafayatha]] || [[word:gafayaja|gafayaja]] || [[word:gafayasha|gafayasha]] || [[word:gafayaka|gafayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gafayath|gafayath]] || [[word:gafayaj|gafayaj]] || [[word:gafayash|gafayash]] || [[word:gafaya|gafaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gafayathal|gafayathal]] || [[word:gafayajal|gafayajal]] || [[word:gafayashal|gafayashal]] || [[word:gafayakal|gafayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gafayathatha|gafayathatha]] || [[word:gafayajaja|gafayajaja]] || [[word:gafayashasha|gafayashasha]] || [[word:gafayaka|gafayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gafayathan|gafayathan]] || [[word:gafayajan|gafayajan]] || [[word:gafayashan|gafayashan]] || [[word:gafayakan|gafayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gafayathaoro|gafayathaoro]] || [[word:gafayajaoro|gafayajaoro]] || [[word:gafayashaoro|gafayashaoro]] || [[word:gafayakaoro|gafayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
